Chord Electronics At Audio Show Deluxe 2026

March 14, 2026

CHORD ELECTRONICS ULTIMA PRE3 AND ULTIMA 3 MONO AMPLIFIERS AT AUDIO SHOW DELUXE 2026

Chord Electronics will make its first appearance at Audio Show Deluxe 2026, where the company will present a selection of its amplification products and provide demonstrations across the weekend.

Visitors will be able to hear a system built around components from the brand’s flagship amplification range, with the company’s team present to demonstrate the equipment and discuss the technology used in its designs.

CHORD ELECTRONICS ULTIMA PRE3 AND ULTIMA 3 MONO AMPLIFIERS ON DEMONSTRATION

A key part of the demonstration system will be the Chord Electronics Ultima Pre3 preamplifier paired with the Chord Electronics Ultima 3 mono power amplifiers.

The Ultima Pre3 is a line-level preamplifier that forms part of the company’s Ultima series, while the Ultima 3 mono amplifiers deliver dedicated power amplification for each channel. Together, they represent a combination drawn from the company’s flagship amplification range.

PREVIEW OF CHORD ELECTRONICS QUARTET

In addition to the amplification system, visitors will also be able to see preview models of the forthcoming Chord Electronics Quartet. The Quartet is an upcoming product from the company and the preview at the show offers an early look at a development that is expected to join the manufacturer’s portfolio in the future.

CHORD ELECTRONICS AT AUDIO SHOW DELUXE 2026

Throughout the show, members of the Chord Electronics team will be available to demonstrate the system and answer questions about the equipment and the design approach behind the products.

Visitors attending Audio Show Deluxe 2026 will be able to find Chord Electronics exhibiting in the Syndicate 27 room.

AUDIO SHOW DELUXE 2026 INFO & TICKETS

Audio Show Deluxe returns for its fourth year in 2026, bringing together the UK’s most prestigious audio brands under one roof. From celebrated international names to specialist artisans, this is an event dedicated to the very best in high-end audio. Music lovers will have the chance to discover systems that redefine what true luxury listening can be.

Audio Show Deluxe takes place on the 21st March and 22nd March 2026
Location: Whittlebury Park Hotel, Whittlebury, Towcester NN12 8QH

Opening Times: The show will open on Saturday from 9.30 am to 6.00 pm. A live performance by King Brasstards will take place at 5:00 pm.

On Sunday, the show will run from 9.30 am to 5.00 pm. The live music performance will begin at 4.00 pm, featuring guitarist Antonio Forcione.

Visitors attending across the weekend will be able to experience both the full exhibitor line-up and the scheduled live performances as part of the Audio Show Deluxe programme.

Tickets can be booked in advance here
